mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_REPLY.CURRVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO REPLY ( REPLY_ID, REPLY_CONTENT, CREATE_DATE, BOARD_ID, USER_ID, DELETE_DATE, MODIFY_DATE ) VALUES ( SEQ_REPLY.NEXTVAL, #{replyContent}, SYSDATE, #{boardId}, #{userId}, NULL, NULL )
mapper.select: SELECT REPLY_ID AS replyId, REPLY_CONTENT AS replyContent, CREATE_DATE AS createDate, BOARD_ID AS boardId, USER_ID AS userId, DELETE_DATE AS deleteDate, MODIFY_DATE AS modifyDate FROM REPLY WHERE BOARD_ID = #{boardId} AND DELETE_DATE IS NULL ORDER BY CREATE_DATE ASC

SELECT REPLY_ID AS replyId, REPLY_CONTENT AS replyContent, CREATE_DATE AS createDate, BOARD_ID AS boardId, USER_ID AS userId, DELETE_DATE AS deleteDate, MODIFY_DATE AS modifyDate FROM REPLY WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND DELETE_DATE IS NULL ORDER BY CREATE_DATE DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY
mapper.update: UPDATE REPLY SET REPLY_CONTENT = #{replyContent}, MODIFY_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE REPLY_ID = #{replyId} AND DELETE_DATE IS NULL
UPDATE REPLY SET DELETE_DATE = SYSDATE, MODIFY_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE REPLY_ID = #{replyId} AND DELETE_DATE IS NULL
